word: H7250 - רָבַע - râbaʻ - raw-bah' - Let gender

sections.paragraph:
Original: רבע

Transliteration: râba‛

Phonetic: raw-bah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to lie stretched out, lie down
    1. (Qal)
      1. to lie down
        1. for repose
        2. for copulation (of woman with beast)
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to lay down (of cattle breeding)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2108

Part(s) of speech: Verb
